meaning: adj.接有电线的,以线加强的,以铁丝围起的,极其兴奋的 <<连线>>杂志
examples: Many colleges now have wired dormitories.
The bank wired her the money.
The bank wired the money to her.
Kristie Lu Stout started her career in journalism in San Francisco at Wired magazine's online division.
Emma Smith founded the Wired Woman Society in 1996 and co-authored Technology With Curves in 2000.
